name: @flight-academy/api-assets
description: Dev-only Bun workspace for apps/api: Tailwind v4 CLI compiles styles/app.css into static/app.css at build time (ADR-020 §O). Not in production runtime — the compiled CSS is served by the Rust binary via tower-http ServeDir today, and by rust-embed once the embedded-static feature lands (ADR-002 §H).
